title: YouTube SEO for AI Search: How to Rank your YouTube Videos | 3.3. AEO Course by Ahrefs
lesson: YouTube is the most-cited domain in Google's AI Overviews; Ahrefs walks through a 3-step process to rank your videos in Google and earn AI Overview citations.
b2b_application: Make videos that answer the exact questions a buyer would ask an AI, so your brand is the source the AI answer pulls from.
is_person_note: Ahrefs is a company page; @mention (Step 1.5) would tag the company, not a person.
confirmed: 2026-07-18 via /browse — video URL live (200); lesson taken from the video's own description (shortDescription). LinkedIn company slug not yet browse-confirmed; verify before any Step 1.5 @mention.
